title: How a godly man leads — without making it about himself
caption:
Real leadership cost him everything.

Most men want the title. Few want what comes with it — the first apology, the last seat at the table, the problem no one else will touch.

The model is a man who washed feet the night before he died. He knew who he was — so he had nothing to prove. That's not a management style. It's a formation.

A godly man leads by going first into the cost. Not because he has to. Because that's what it looks like when Christ has hold of a man.

Save this for the man you're becoming.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #servant #humility
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
